title: Region-Based Segmentation Flow
description: A flowchart illustrating the iterative process of region growing and the complementary processes of region splitting and merging to achieve image segmentation.
relationships: Starts with Input Image which feeds into two main branches: Region Growing and Region Splitting & Merging
Region Growing uses Seed Points and the Homogeneity Criterion to iteratively grow Grown Regions
Region Splitting begins with an Initial Partition (e.g., the whole image) and checks each region's homogeneity; non-homogeneous regions are Split into Quadrants recursively
The results of both branches feed into a Final Region Map
Region Merging then checks this map for Adjacent Regions and Merges them if they meet the homogeneity criterion, refining the Final Region Map
